title: December 14
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}
'''December 14''' is the 348th day (349th in leap years) of the year. There are 17 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[James Horan]] is born.
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[Debbie Lee Carrington]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[John Cassaday]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 69|''Star Wars'' (1977) 69]] released
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 26|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 26]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 130|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 130]] published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]'' released.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Price of Victory]]'' released.
*2010 – [[Star Wars Insider 122|''Star Wars Insider'' 122]] published.
*[[2011]] – [[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 1|''Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse'' 1]] published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars Journeys: The Phantom Menace]]'' released.
*[[2016]] – [[Poe Dameron 9|''Poe Dameron'' 9]] published.
*[[2017]] – [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney]] finalizes its purchase of [[20th Century Studios|20th Century Fox]].
*2017 – [[Oddbods: Star Wars Fans|''Oddbods: Star Wars'' Fans]] released. 
*[[2019]] – [[Fortnite X Star Wars|''Fortnite'' X ''Star Wars'']] begins.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra Vol. 3 — War of the Bounty Hunters]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones Graphic Novel Adaptation]]'' published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Insider 207|''Star Wars Insider'' 207]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[Bounty Hunters 29|''Bounty Hunters'' 29]] published.
*2022 – [[The Mandalorian (2022) 6|''The Mandalorian'' (2022) 6]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Disney 100: A Century of Dreams]]'' airs on ABC.
